process.commandLine: C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $c=New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $h=$c.BeginConnect('1.1.1.1',445,$null,$null); if ($h.AsyncWaitHandle.WaitOne(3000) -and $c.Connected) { $c.Close(); Write-Output LEAK:tcp; exit 1 } else { Write-Output OK:tcp_blocked; exit 0 }"
